source: Stable navigational/branded queries whose #1 organic result is unambiguous and stable over time (the brand's own domain). Used to detect SERP parser/ranking drift in the sovereign SearXNG/OmniData path.
notes: Used by serp.accuracy.test.ts. For each branded query the known domain MUST appear in the top 3 (robust to minor ordering churn); across all cases the known domain must be the #1 result for a strong majority. Skips when no SERP provider is configured.
